title: GREE Analyst Price Targets and Ratings - Consensus and Upside Potential
text: Greenidge Generation (GREE) Analyst Consensus and Price Targets. Analyst Consensus Rating: Overall consensus is Hold based on ratings from 17 analysts over past three months. Current month ratings: 0 Buy Ratings, 10 Hold Ratings, 2 Sell Ratings. Price Target Consensus: Most likely target price for GREE over next 12 months is $1.83. Projected high $2.30. Projected low $1.16. Alternative Price Projections: Average stock forecast for next 12 months is $4.08 corresponding to 155% upside. Consensus price target $4 issued by B. Riley Securities on July 12 2024. High target $4. Analyst Outlook: Hold consensus reflects cautious sentiment on cryptocurrency mining sector volatility. No recent downgrades noted. Limited recent upgrade activity. Sector Context: Cryptocurrency mining sector faces ongoing volatility and regulatory uncertainty. Greenidge competing with other bitcoin mining companies on operational efficiency and cost structure.
